features.name: multi_port_memory_multiple_readers_writers
features.description: Code should include a memory declaration with 3 read ports and 2 write ports where each port has a distinct address expression source (wire, input, constant)

features.name: complex_expression_memory_port_addresses
features.description: Code should include memory port addresses derived from complex expressions (multiplication results, shift operations) rather than simple registers or literals

features.name: diverse_width_integer_operations
features.description: Code should include operations on integers of widely varying bit widths (1-bit to 32-bit) including sign conversion and arithmetic in the same expression chain
